did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper uses Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) and vibrational analysis (VOCT) to correlate noninvasive measurements with histopathology in squamous cell carcinoma. The methods involve manual image processing using MATLAB and ImageJ to generate pixel intensity versus depth plots and analyze resonant frequencies. While reference 9 mentions 'artificial intelligence' in the title of a different study, this specific paper does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results; it relies on physical property analysis and manual image processing.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
